revision.comment: Bot: created missing page [[MediaWiki:Histlegend]] redirect to enwiki [[MediaWiki:Histlegend]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects

revision.text: {{flatlist|class=inline}}External tools: * [https://wikipedia.ramselehof.de/wikiblame.php?lang=en&article={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Find addition/removal]{{#if:{{NAMESPACE}}|| ([https://xtools.wmcloud.org/blame/en.wikipedia.org?page={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Alternate])}} * [https://sigma.toolforge.org/usersearch.py?page={{urlencode:{{#titleparts:{{FULLPAGENAME}}}}|QUERY}}&server=enwiki Find edits by user] ([https://xtools.wmcloud.org/topedits/en.wikipedia.org?namespace={{NAMESPACENUMBER}}&page={{PAGENAMEE}}&focus=username Alternate]) * [https://xtools.wmcloud.org/articleinfo/en.wikipedia.org/{{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Page statistics] * [https://pageviews.wmcloud.org/?pages={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}&project=en.wikipedia.org Pageviews] * [https://iabot.wmcloud.org/index.php?page=runbotsingle&pagesearch={{FULLPAGENAMEE}}&wiki=enwiki Fix dead links] * [https://copyvios.toolforge.org/?lang=en&project=wikipedia&title={{FULLPAGENAMEE}} Copyvio detector] {{endflatlist}} ---- For any version listed below, click on its date to view it. revision.comment: 1 revision imported: overwriting with templates included
